## Checklist

- [ ] Tested in Chrome
- [ ] Tested in one other browser (Firefox / Safari / Edge)
- [ ] No console errors or warnings
- [ ] Mobile viewport meta tag present (if adding a game)
- [ ] Linked from `index.html` (if adding a game)
- [ ] `README.md` updated if the game count or top-level structure changed
- [ ] Follows code style in [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
